Anant Ambani and Radhika Merchant recently tied the knot in a grand wedding in Mumbai. After the wedding, speculations made headlines that the couple would have honeymoon in London. However, instead of London, Radhika and Anant along with Ambani clan were spotted enjoying the Paris 2024 Olympics. A picture of the entire family is now making rounds on the internet, featuring Anant Ambani, Radhika Merchant, Mukesh Ambani, Isha Ambani, and Anand Piramal.

In the picture, Anant can be seen wearing a vibrant outfit with a tropical print, whereas Radhika is seen in a bright orange outfit. Just below the couple, Mukesh Ambani, Anand Piramal, and his wife Isha Ambani were spotted sitting and enjoying the match. Meanwhile, Radhika and Anant can be seen having a good time, their relaxed demeanour evident.Mukesh Ambani is wearing a classic blue and white striped shirt, while Isha Ambani is sitting next to her husband Anand Piramal, who is wearing a white shirt.Take a look at the picture:Add India.com as a Preferred SourceOn Saturday, Nita Ambani inaugurated the India House for the Paris Olympics. Needless to say, this initiative is one of its kind for India at the Olympic Games. Before these pictures emerged on the internet, various speculations claimed that after throwing a massive wedding, the Ambanis would continue with the celebrations. The speculations also suggested that the Ambani family’s next stop would be London, where Anant and Radhika’s post-wedding celebrations would continue.Returning to Anant Ambani and Radhika Merchant’s pre-wedding, the couple hosted a grand wedding event attended by several B-town celebs. Mukesh Ambani is wearing a classic blue and white striped shirt, while Isha Ambani is sitting next to her husband Anand Piramal, who is wearing a white shirt.

Take a look at the picture:







On Saturday, Nita Ambani inaugurated the India House for the Paris Olympics. Needless to say, this initiative is one of its kind for India at the Olympic Games. Before these pictures emerged on the internet, various speculations claimed that after throwing a massive wedding, the Ambanis would continue with the celebrations. The speculations also suggested that the Ambani family’s next stop would be London, where Anant and Radhika’s post-wedding celebrations would continue.

Returning to Anant Ambani and Radhika Merchant’s pre-wedding, the couple hosted a grand wedding event attended by several B-town celebs. The wedding was preceded by months of pre-wedding festivities.

title: No Honeymoon For Anant Ambani-Radhika Merchant After Wedding? Couple Enjoy Gala Getaway at Paris 2024 Olympics  With Family | India.com
description: Anant Ambani and Radhika Merchant were spotted enjoying at the Paris 2024 Olympics.  The couple were spotted for the first time after their grand wedding in Mumbai.  - No Honeymoon For Anant Ambani-Radhika Merchant After Wedding? Couple Enjoy Gala Getaway at Paris 2024 Olympics  With Family
